feedback.suggestions: Run some BIg O on your algorithms? Some of these games had clear bottlenecks re eating up memory and / or CPU speed. Feels like something that any IDE should be able to help with graphically
feedback.funCriteria: Did it interest me? Did it occupy my attention? Did I get bored? Was I waiting for the game to end? Was anything annoying about the game? Could I see myself playing it after this?
